rulings.Case Title: DAVID STOOPS ET AL VS. 300 BUCHANAN I3, LP ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Plaintiffs Third Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Sep 6, 2019 line 3. DEFENDANT 300 BUCHANAN I3, LP, VERITAS INVESTMENTS, INC., GREENTREE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC., YAT-PANG AU, 300 BUCHANAN C1, LLC. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Plaintiffs Third Amended Complaint is DENIED in part and GRANTED in part. The motion is granted as to the following language "$100,000 per Plaintiff" at page 29, line 22. Motion is otherwise denied. Request for punitive damages is sufficiently stated. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JEFFREY MA ET AL VS. PATRICK FOY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Application For Right To Attach Order And Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Sep 6, 2019 line 4. PLAINTIFF MICHAEL LUU Notice Of Application For Right To Attach Order And Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment is DENIED without prejudice. Plaintiff failed to make sufficient showing re: the merits and the amount to be attached. Additionally, alter ego claims are not supported. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: AMY L. HUNT VS. MARCO SALCISSIA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Sep 6, 2019 line 8. DEFENDANT MARCO SALSICCIA DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently states a cause of action for unlawful detainer. Plaintiff complied with the applicable SFRO provisions. At a minimum, this demurrer improperly raises issue of fact re: ownership and negotiability of instrument. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: EMILY COLLINS VS. FERNANDO COSTA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Sep 6, 2019 line 9. DEFENDANT FERNANDO COSTA, MARTA GONCALVES DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED without leave to amend. Notice is fatally defective. Compliance with SFRO is not a mathematical or legal impossibility. Additionally, Plaintiff could have provided in the Notice (but did not) an affirmative statement that the three listed owners are the only co-owners and they hold 1/3 and 2/3 interests respectively. Such narrative explanation would supplement the imperfect mathematical expression re: rounding. = (501/CFH)
